emails.subject: RE: ERCOT Registration Requirements
emails.body: RE: ERCOT Registration Requirements The lse is not ees though. The required software is in a non bankrupt entity that lloyd controls relating to control area services. Not sure what the other issues would be but wait to hear. Thanks, Doug Doug-Gilbert Smith

emails.subject: RE: ERCOT Registration Requirements
emails.body: Is EPMI the LSE? To: Nicolay, Christi L.

emails.subject: RE: ERCOT Registration Requirements
emails.body: RE: ERCOT Registration Requirements Yes I believe so but the software is not Thanks Doug-Gilbert Smith
